sqlMap.select: /*DialogDgrcompoSort.selectDgrcompoSortDgrcompoList*/ SELECT B.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , B.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , B.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , B.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , B.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , B.DEMAND_BGT_AMT , B.BGT_AMT FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRCOMPO B WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND B.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND B.TE_MNG_MOK_CD = A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId# ORDER BY B.SORT_SEQ

/*DialogDgrcompoSort.selectDgrcompoSortDgrcompoListNew*/ SELECT A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , A.DEMAND_BGT_AMT , A.BGT_AMT FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.DEPT_CD = #deptCd# AND A.DBIZ_CD = #dbizCd# ORDER BY A.SORT_SEQ
sqlMap.update: /*DialogDgrcompoSort.updateDgrcompoSort*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPO A SET SORT_SEQ = #sortSeq# , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
sqlMap.insert: /*DialogDgrcompoSort.insertCngHistory*/ INSERT INTO TB_CNG_HISTORY ( CNG_HISTORY_ID , CNG_TYPE , TITLE , INDI_BNS , NOTE , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE) VALUES( #cngHistoryId# , #cngType# , #title# , #dgrcompoNm# , '' , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP)

/*DialogDgrcompoSort.insertDgrCompoOri*/ INSERT INTO TB_DGRCOMPO_ORI ( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , CNG_HISTORY_ID , DEPT_CD , DBIZ_CD , TE_MNG_MOK_CD , TE_MNG_MOK_NM , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , DEMAND_COMPO_SORT_SEQ , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL , DEMAND_COMP_GROUND , DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , DEMAND_BGT_AMT , DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , DEMAND_FORM_DSP_YN , COMPO_SORT_SEQ , COMPO_LEVEL , COMP_GROUND , COMP_FORMULAR , BGT_AMT , PRE_FORMULAR , PRE_AMT , DIFF_AMT , COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , FORM_DSP_YN , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , SORT_SEQ , PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , PRE_BGT_AMT , CNG_TYPE , GRP_ID , GRP_LVL , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE) SELECT TD1.FIS_YEAR , TD1.BGT_DGR , TD1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , '' AS CNG_HISTORY_ID , TD1.DEPT_CD , TD1.DBIZ_CD , TD1.TE_MNG_MOK_CD , TD1.TE_MNG_MOK_NM , TD1.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , TD1.DEMAND_COMPO_SORT_SEQ , TD1.DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL , TD1.DEMAND_COMP_GROUND , TD1.DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , TD2.DEMAND_BGT_AMT , TD2.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , TD2.DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , TD1.DEMAND_FORM_DSP_YN , TD1.COMPO_SORT_SEQ , TD1.COMPO_LEVEL , TD1.COMP_GROUND , TD1.COMP_FORMULAR , TD2.BGT_AMT , TD1.PRE_FORMULAR , TD2.PRE_AMT , TD2.DIFF_AMT , TD2.COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , TD1.FORM_DSP_YN , TD1.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , TD1.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , TD1.SORT_SEQ , TD1.PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , TD2.PRE_BGT_AMT , TD1.CNG_TYPE , TD1.GRP_ID , TD1.GRP_LVL , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_DGRCOMPO TD1 , (SELECT SUM(DEMAND_BGT_AMT) AS DEMAND_BGT_AMT , SUM(DEMAND_DIFF_AMT) AS DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , SUM(DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL_AMT) AS DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , SUM(BGT_AMT) AS BGT_AMT , SUM(PRE_AMT) AS PRE_AMT , SUM(DIFF_AMT) AS DIFF_AMT , SUM(COMPO_LEVEL_AMT) AS COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , SUM(PRE_BGT_AMT) AS PRE_BGT_AMT FROM TB_DGRCOMPO WHERE BGT_DGR IN ('3') AND FIS_YEAR IN ('2019') AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID IN ('L0000000054', 'L0000000057')) TD2 WHERE TD1.BGT_DGR = '3' AND TD1.FIS_YEAR = '2019' AND TD1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = 'L0000000057'
